items.title: Avid Health at Home completes its 8th tuck-in acquisition
items.note: Havencrest-backed home care platform adds Kentucky/Ohio agency Tech Medical, cites AI workflow automation

items.title: Exodigo buys engineering firm V&A in a $25-30M contech deal
items.note: AI underground-mapping startup adds SoCal infrastructure engineering, clients include Caltrans and LA Metro

items.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
items.note: rollout began July 7; over 90% of usage is non-coding work, tasks run and wait for approval from your phone

items.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work, its GPT-5.6 workplace agent
items.note: spans Slack, Drive, email and CRMs to turn a goal into finished docs, sheets and slides over hours

items.title: 30-year mortgage ticks up to 6.49%
items.note: Freddie Mac's weekly PMMS, up from 6.43% the week before, still below 6.72% a year ago

items.title: Cyera in advanced talks to buy Oasis Security for over $1B
items.note: would be Cyera's 6th acquisition in 18 months, Oasis built agentic access management and raised ~$195M
